de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature.instantiator

Class ForEachCP

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature.instantiator.ForEachCP
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Feature

    public class ForEachCP
extends Object
implements Feature
    Feature representing a ChoicePoint that iterates over the terms returned by a TermGenerator. The terms are stored in a TermBuffer one after the other and can subsequently be used to instantiate a rule application

    • Method Detail

      • create

        public static Feature create(TermBuffer var,
                             TermGenerator generator,
                             Feature body,
                             BackTrackingManager manager)
        Parameters:
        var - TermBuffer in which the terms are going to be stored
        generator - the terms that are to be iterated over
        body - a feature that is supposed to be evaluated repeatedly for the possible values of var

      • computeCost

        public RuleAppCost computeCost(RuleApp app,
                               PosInOccurrence pos,
                               Goal goal)
        Description copied from interface: Feature
        Evaluate the cost of a RuleApp.
        Specified by:
        computeCost in interface Feature
        Parameters:
        app - the RuleApp
        pos - position where app is to be applied
        goal - the goal on which app is to be applied
        Returns:
        the cost of the rule application expressed as a RuleAppCost object. TopRuleAppCost.INSTANCE indicates that the rule shall not be applied at all (it is discarded by the strategy).
